title: Getting Started — How to Pledge
description: New to Powerplay? Learn how to officially join Yuri Grom and start your journey as a pledged commander.

title: Merits & Permanent Ranks
description: Understand the ranking system, how to earn merits, and the exclusive rewards waiting for loyal followers.

title: Weekly Assignments — The 2.5x Multiplier
description: The secret to rapid ranking. Learn how to complete your 5 weekly missions to unlock a massive merit boost.

title: Combat Operations (PP 2.0)
description: Master the art of combat-based merit gathering and system reinforcement through tactical engagement.

title: Containment Missiles — Tool
description: A deep dive into Grom's signature weapon: how to use it effectively in PvP and PvE encounters.

title: Covert Acquisition — Expansion
description: Strategically expand Yuri Grom's influence through covert operations and diplomatic pressure.

title: Reinforcement — Defending the Union
description: Learn the logistics of system reinforcement to ensure our territories remain secure and profitable.
